title: Access to personal information request revised to accommodate both requestor and organization
summary: A new condominium owner attempted to have certain defects in his unit remedied by the condominium developer. After meeting and dealing with different representatives from the organization and being told the defective items would be replaced, the owner was unsatisfied with the progress of the replacements. He escalated his complaint within...
